name: orchid_updated_value
answer: The default command for pulling remote worktrees is `orchid sync`. # Orchid CLI Manual v1 Orchid CLI is the workspace sync tool used in the local deployment stack.

name: nova_updated_value
answer: The default cache mode in Nova Build is `local`.

name: ruma_updated_value
answer: The default retrieval top_k in RUMA Agent is `2`.

name: cinder_updated_value
answer: The default retry backoff mode is `fixed_30s`. # Cinder Queue Manual v1 Cinder Queue is the retry and queue manager used in the background job stack.

name: helios_updated_value
answer: The default publish target is `internal`. # Helios Packager Manual v1 Helios Packager is the release packaging tool used in the internal delivery path.

name: marlin_updated_value
answer: The default healthcheck command is `marlin probe`. # Marlin Proxy Manual v1 Marlin Proxy is the service-edge proxy used in the gateway layer.

name: quartz_updated_value
answer: The default schedule mode is `steady`. # Quartz Scheduler Manual v1 Quartz Scheduler is the orchestration scheduler used for batch planning.

name: atlas_updated_value
answer: The default alert mode in Atlas Monitor is `summary`.

name: ember_updated_value
answer: The default queue class in Ember Runner is `standard`.

name: lumen_updated_value
answer: The default eviction policy in Lumen Cache is `lru`.

name: sable_updated_value
answer: The default rollout mode in Sable Deploy is `linear`.

name: tidal_updated_value
